First stable release. Automates the full One Pace lifecycle for Plex: RSS
polling, qBittorrent dispatch, canonical renaming, library placement with
re-release replacement, per-episode Plex metadata sync, fan-made posters, and
Discord notifications.

## Highlights

- **Web dashboard** — live logs, pipeline table with download progress, library
  coverage report with one-click upgrades, system health panel
- **Re-release handling** — disk-truth file swap keyed on `S##E##`, changelog
  surfaced from the feed
- **Extended-cut support** — prefer-extended selection, `[Extended]` filename
  tag, upgrade detection
- **Metadata** — ladyisatis dataset plus optional Google Sheets supplements for
  early CRC32/title/description resolution
- **Manual source search** — AnimeTosho/Nyaa lookup for episodes the feed no
  longer carries
- **Normalize File Naming** — batch-rename legacy files to the canonical scheme
- **Runtime settings** — env-override precedence, editable live from the
  dashboard; optional Basic-auth protection
- **Appearance** — light/dark/auto plus all DaisyUI themes, selectable logo

## Docker

```
docker pull ghcr.io/dyonng/one-pace-plex-automator:1.0.0
```
